'''Caldera Righim''' was a [[Talz/Legends|Talz]]. He resided on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], and was often spotted enjoying a drink at [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]]. He was often present during the night when [[Ackmena/Legends|Ackmena]] was the bartender. Like most Talz, Caldera was a pacifist. He was a good friend of [[Wuher/Legends|Wuher]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special]]'' {{1st}} {{C|as Cullatran}}
